textByHash.00a1d5f3bea6bc64583f7b89d4b728fa5bd87ee9: Well, I suppose it wouldn't be exotic for you, since you're from the surface.
textByHash.11e7666aeee69d268ce30a2de77605698e914bcd: Keldagrim's very nice to visit, but I don't think I'd want to live there.
textByHash.2739ebd21f18ec7de2a0f4db78c1b1e2a5d28759: So, what do you think of our city, surface-dweller?
textByHash.306b100dc051982bc2374b8a240a88282b2f52ec: How can you see properly with such tiny little eyes?
textByHash.361280b51844f58e1789a3eae92dc2eff7b2815f: That it's a secret... which means we shouldn't tell strangers about it.
textByHash.37f6b38b34837d1be0c0734de3dea381692ef8d5: You haven't got a tinderbox! What if your light goes out?
textByHash.39730ee72e046e678f6d47188767de7af5bee1e6: Visiting Keldagrim is so exciting! I never thought I'd be so far from Dorgesh-Kaan in my life!
textByHash.3c24d9873b2f247c80170217389af3fb302cab86: What are you doing down here without a lamp?
textByHash.451c4aaa49d7dddc243d555e83fbbe85560c8207: I'm a bit worried about the increase of humans these days.
textByHash.4ef1aff6284263d12595017ca673b4849f4eead3: Yes, but a goblin from the surface...
textByHash.5aa3f9ccfbc221af24621b19edfb296dfd82d700: Movario's paying us to help him with his expedition. He thin-
textByHash.6133d437f51634809d6223363240a4afd53d3bdf: Well Ulgon's climbing down to see if he can find the bottom. He didn't reach it last time, so Movario made us get a longer rope.
textByHash.62e125a092d48444c324df6698ef90f89766306c: Zanik? I should hope that fool isn't in command of anything!
textByHash.6641237e6a1d9d0e9543b4193ce388f486f51341: You're the human who secured peace between the Dorgeshuun and Lumbridge, aren't you?
textByHash.733068ac4d0c970aeba69dccc97f19ae6105ca8e: Have you visited the market? There are visitors selling foods from all over the surface there. It's so exotic!
textByHash.75c4177d242f9b245aeec32111a981515478fe16: But be careful not to let it near swamp gas! Watch out for the warning marks.
textByHash.80da59ee08376b6f909b69886e15e3d0ed1895c3: But you should check it out anyway. Maybe you could sell some of your food. Everyone's crazy about surface food at the moment.
textByHash.8722a6f9af1dbb0da917dd6e98654ba12681cf2e: Here, I have a spare torch.
textByHash.90bf9dd65c064813a8a206aea877744f62c4dac3: Well, it beats crawling around on the surface with nothing above your head!
textByHash.97a0f0fd554cf43987d1a07fd2ed6f6b5010444e: Beware of swamp gas! Look out for the warning marks!
textByHash.9864875c61510d0d22c8bddef8216310d3044e84: Watch out! You don't want to let a naked flame near swamp gas! Look out for the warning marks.
textByHash.9bba97127d344ef20aeb3f50dcc31961b070ce2a: Watch out, surface-dweller! Don't get too close to the edge!
textByHash.9bd221c342c03296dddfdb9319607e264f58f3ec: Oh dear, oh dear. I hope this dwarf train works properly!
textByHash.aeff4e7a304bface0422b81eae07a3ed1b6f2a1a: These dwarves have so much more advanced technology than us. Look at this train! We could never build something like this.
textByHash.b025bbbcf8b578bbe488cf90ea7228a0af6037be: Movario's paying us to help him with his expedition. He thinks there's something important down this chasm.
textByHash.b40eb7f031261acede26f5f5420486e162d4050d: That, surface-dweller, was the right answer.
textByHash.b4845bdb512f1d295d17765d24327215d384f2ab: Zanik? She's no commander... I think she's in Oldak's lab at the moment.
textByHash.b6c80781491679d704f2572a1ed6b7b7749511b6: What do you think you're doing?
textByHash.bb26dbf7a70350c27f58ffb37ab36177d90c48a1: Everyone's talking about how you helped Zanik save the city! You're a hero!
textByHash.bbcde0d67c9b8fbff487afee6892212bd177a5bb: Oh! Welcome to the city, surface goblin! What are you doing down here?
textByHash.bed0cc17bfc8cf3ffd460a1383640760310115a2: What's it like on the surface? It sounds scary to me, having nothing above my head.
textByHash.c22c9592c4fad53c75ee9a0e996e042bc9fb3d41: I'm still not sure it would be for me, though.
textByHash.c2812b7830f01e6d270002b13330e6f8efe0d993: Don't shine that thing in my eyes!
textByHash.f0a5185a2f42f155ec87681762847ac176f4581f: Never mind, you can stay down here now!
textByHash.f3efda73076c17e5591876c4085de3484782cdcf: Thank you so much! I was worried it was a return to the times of war, but perhaps surface-dwellers are not so bad.
textByHash.fdd1bccfb1fe655948a86959b84eea0e35753d84: Everyone's talking about how you rescued Zanik! You're the city's hero again!
